title: How utilities can add capacity in months, not years
snippet: For utilities managing surging electricity demand, a scalable, non-wires approach to expanding grid capacity can be deployed in just a few months.
ai_summary: Article discusses non-wires solutions for grid capacity expansion. Relevant background on grid infrastructure trends that affect wholesale market and demand-side flexibility opportunities.
ai_reasoning: Relates to grid management and capacity solutions, which touches on flexibility and trading, but is US-focused and not directly actionable for tem's UK I&C business this week.
